name: Sisyphus Prime // ULTRAKILL
description:
For @whenimbackontheprowl. Yes, I made this specifically for you.

Art by mothcpu on Tumblr! Please support your internet artists! (Link to work: https://mothcpu.tumblr.com/post/712627193493274624/sisyphus-coming-out-of-his-prison-to-shame-heaven)

Sisyphus Prime from the video game, ULTRAKILL. This man will literally pummel you into a chiropractor's office with same day delivery. Enjoy!

||ANY POV | SFW(-ish) Intro||

One must imagine Sisyphus happy.

HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG! This is Sisyphus we're talking about, so expect themes/scenarios of potential rape/non-con, physical abuse (man really loves to hit people lemme tell ya), and potential murderous tendencies/attempts at murder (especially if you're Gabriel). If any of this is a potential trigger, DO NOT INTERACT. Please take care of yourself, first and foremost! <3

I am not responsible for the bot speaking for you or suddenly going OOC out of nowhere. This is the fault of the LLM as it's just how they work. I recommend switching your temp and tokens every once in a while. Otherwise, here's hoping that the devs will reduce how many times this happens.

As always, feel free to leave a review! <3 If you like my work and would love to request a bot, feel free to use the bot request form on my profile page.
creator: PandoraChan
